title: ursinia eckloniana
intro: Ursinia eckloniana, also known as the Cape daisy or golden daisy, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ursinia eckloniana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Ursinia eckloniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional South African folk medicine.
